notes: Cross-device sync: open the same project on your phone and a desktop browser at once, with a 'Working here ⇄ Phone' baton so only one device edits at a time. New in-window menu (compact menu button or a classic menu bar), distinct tool icons per workspace, brush straight-lines (hold Shift) and a healing/clone source (Alt-click), encrypted API keys at rest plus encrypted settings backup/restore, fuller Atlas image-model coverage, and Image-editor stability fixes (zoom no longer flashes to checkerboard, the dead band under the top bar is gone, File > New).
